title: OnePlus Nord 6 hands-on review
First photos of solar eclipse from Artemis II crew look almost too good to be real
summary: The Artemis II astronauts have already captured some incredible sights of the Earth and Moon during their journey. Now we can add a new visual to that list: a total solar eclipse as seen from deep space. It looks almost too perfect; the Moon has crisp, but uneven edges, while bright stars dot the a…
